name: Corporate Clean
author: akellainmotion
description: Professional blue and gray palette, structured layout, trustworthy and clean

componentOverrides.button: bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-lg font-medium px-5 py-2.5 hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors shadow-sm
componentOverrides.card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6
componentOverrides.input: bg-white rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 px-4 py-2
componentOverrides.badge: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 rounded-md text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5
componentOverrides.alert: bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg p-4 text-blue-800
